attacking_style: Exploits early breakaway opportunities on mountainous stages, showing ability to dominate KOM competitions while conserving energy for solo finishes. Capable of sustaining long-range solo efforts once established in breaks.
team_tactics: Insufficient data across multiple races to establish clear team tactical patterns.
terrain_preference: Mountainous stages with multiple categorized climbs where KOM points are contested. Shows climbing strength that exceeds initial expectations for his profile, suggesting potential on medium-mountain stages.
vulnerability: Limited data, but reliance on breakaway success suggests potential weakness in direct confrontations with pure climbers or in bunch sprint scenarios where positioning matters.
key_patterns: Single observation only - insufficient evidence for repeating patterns
Showed unexpected climbing depth at age 23, dominating KOM classification
Capitalized on peloton miscalculation to convert breakaway into solo victory
form_trajectory: unknown: Only single race observation available from 2021, insufficient recent data to assess current trajectory
